scripts.subscribeTenants: cds subscribe t1 --to http://localhost:4004 -u yves: && cds subscribe t2 --to http://localhost:4004 -u yves: && cds subscribe t3 --to http://localhost:4004 -u yves:
scripts.upgradeTenants: cds upgrade t1 --at http://localhost:4004 -u yves: && cds upgrade t2 --at http://localhost:4004 -u yves: && cds upgrade t3 --at http://localhost:4004 -u yves:
scripts.unsubscribeTenants: cds unsubscribe t1 --from http://localhost:4004 -u yves: && cds unsubscribe t2 --from http://localhost:4004 -u yves: && cds unsubscribe t3 --from http://localhost:4004 -u yves:
scripts.ship: mbt build -t gen --mtar mta.tar && cf deploy gen/mta.tar -f
